---
title: 'Driving'
date: '2020-12-07T07:23:00.0050000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Connor David Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8827660995209731726'
blogger_filename: '/2020/12/driving.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Connor David Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;Can't believe you're driving now, I just read the post about riding a bike. And you did just as well with the car struggled a little bit and then you took off without a hitch. Your mommy would be so proud of you. You are really amazing.</p>
